name: Memory Card Game
description: Hunkemoller-pattern card-matching game. Cards are loaded from CAPE (files.game.card1–card6). Pure React — no external game engine.
notes: Add card images to CAPE under files.game.card1 through files.game.card6.
Without CAPE images, the game renders colored placeholder tiles.
Win navigates to {{NEXT_AFTER_GAME}}. Add a timer by setting GAME_DURATION in MemoryGame.tsx.
